creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

What are you waiting for? ☀️👙🌴🐚🥥⛱️

#thingstodoinflorida #floridahiddengems #floridabucketlist #floridabeaches #bluestwaterflorida

transcription.text: 75 years. That's how much time you get if you're lucky. 75 years. 75 winters, 75 springtimes, 75 summers, and 75 autumns. When you look at it like that, there's not a lot of time. Don't waste them. Get your head out of the rat race and forget about the superficial things that preoccupy your existence and get back to what's important now.
